Official Title: 
Source: versions - APP Joint Favorable
Media Type: application/pdf
Visual Markup Detected: true -- this document likely contains redline (strikethrough/underline) formatting; plain text extraction may not faithfully represent what the bill changes. See the saved original file.

================================================================================

General Assembly Raised Bill No. 134
February Session, 2026 LCO No. 1102
Referred to Committee on COMMERCE
Introduced by:
(CE)
AN ACT ESTABLISHING AN AIRPORT DEVELOPMENT ZONE IN THE
TOWN OF PLAINVILLE.
Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives in General
Assembly convened:
1 Section 1. Subsection (a) of section 32-75d of the general statutes is
2 repealed and the following is substituted in lieu thereof (Effective October
3 1, 2026):
4 (a) There [is] are established [an] two airport development [zone,]
5 zones:
6 (1) One of which is comprised of the following census blocks as
7 assigned on October 1, 2011, in the towns of Windsor Locks, Suffield,
8 East Granby and Windsor:
T1 090034701001022, 090034701003000, 090034701003001,
T2 090034701003002, 090034701003003, 090034701003004,
T3 090034701003005, 090034701003017, 090034701003018,
T4 090034701003019, 090034701003020, 090034701003021,
T5 090034701003025, 090034701003026, 090034735022009,
T6 090034735022010, 090034735022011, 090034735022012,
T7 090034735022013, 090034735025004, 090034735027000,
LCO 1102 1 of 2

Raised Bill No. 134
T8 090034735029000, 090034735029001, 090034735029002,
T9 090034735029003, 090034735029004, 090034735029006,
T10 090034761009000, 090034761009010, 090034761009011,
T11 090034761009012, 090034761009013, 090034762001023,
T12 090034762001025, 090034762002009, 090034762002013,
T13 090034763003004, 090034763009000, 090034763009001,
T14 090034763009002, 090034763009003, 090034763009004,
T15 090034763009005, 090034763009006, 090034763009007,
T16 090034763009008, 090034763009009, 090034763009010,
T17 090034763009011, 090034763009012, 090034763009013,
T18 090034763009014, 090034763009015, 090034763009016,
T19 090034763009017, 090034763009018, 090034763009020,
T20 090034763009021, 090034763009022, 090034763009023,
T21 090034763009024, 090034763009025, 090034763009026,
T22 090034763009031, 090034763009033, 090034771014005,
T23 090034771014011, 090034771014012, 090034771014013,
T24 090034771014014, 090034771014017, 090034771014018,
T25 090034771014019, 090034771014020, 090034771023025,
T26 090034771023026, 090034771023027, 090034771023036,
T27 090034701003006, 090034701003022, 090034701003023,
T28 090034701005000, 090034761001039, 090034763009028.
9 (2) One of which is comprised of the following census blocks as
10 determined in accordance with the 2020 federal decennial census, in the
11 town of Plainville:
T29 090034204001000, 090034204001001, 090034204001006,
T30 090034204001009, 090034204001010, 090034206021000,
T31 090034206021005, 090034206021006, 090034206021013.
This act shall take effect as follows and shall amend the following
sections:
Section 1 October 1, 2026 32-75d(a)
CE Joint Favorable
FIN Joint Favorable
APP Joint Favorable
